operation.add:
<script src="https://static.traycheckout.com.br/js/finger_print.js" type="text/javascript">
      <script type="text/javascript">
        function copiarPix() {
    // Get the text field
    var copyText = document.getElementById("input-pix");
  
    // Select the text field
    copyText.select();
    copyText.setSelectionRange(0, 99999); // For mobile devices
  
    // Copy the text inside the text field
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(copyText.value);
    
    // Alert the copied text
    alert("Pix Copiado! ");
  }
		</script>
        <script type="text/javascript">
        function copiarBol() {
    // Get the text field
    var copyText = document.getElementById("input-bol");
  
    // Select the text field
    copyText.select();
    copyText.setSelectionRange(0, 99999); // For mobile devices
  
    // Copy the text inside the text field
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(copyText.value);
    
    // Alert the copied text
    alert("Boleto Copiado! ");
  }
		</script>

{% if myapay %}
{% endif %}

{% if myapay %}
{% endif %}

Pedido Nº: {{ meupedido }}

Data Adicionado Situação do Pedido Detalhes
